metaBuilds.title: Physical Skirmisher
metaBuilds.whyLine: Strongest meta core for 10s rotation damage, online around minute 25 — about 1,302 damage over a 10s rotation in the sim.
metaBuilds.optimizer: Optimizer sees +23% more 10s rotation damage: try Viper over Augmentation (sim-only — the popular pick may carry utility the sim can't see; test it).

metaBuilds.title: Physical DPS Carry
metaBuilds.whyLine: Strongest meta core for sustained auto DPS, online around minute 25 — about 204 auto-attack DPS in the sim.
metaBuilds.optimizer: Optimizer sees +75% more sustained auto DPS: try Viper over Augmentation (sim-only — the popular pick may carry utility the sim can't see; test it).

metaBuilds.title: Meta Core
metaBuilds.whyLine: Evidence-only: one item in this core is not in our mechanics data yet, so the sim cannot decompose it.

matchups.gameplan: Your kill threat peaks early-to-mid: cash it in before their later items level the exchange. Steel deals area damage — spread out so one cast can't catch the group.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Raiment of Renewal instead of Augmentation: their 3s all-in loses 15% of its bite, at the cost of 22% of this kit's damage.

matchups.gameplan: You hold the kill-threat edge wherever one exists: play front-foot, but respect jungle attention. Khaimera's main threat is Cull; bait it before you commit, and armor softens the trade.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Warden's Faith instead of Augmentation: their 3s all-in loses 26% of its bite, at the cost of 22% of this kit's damage.

matchups.gameplan: You hold the kill-threat edge wherever one exists: play front-foot, but respect jungle attention. Serath's main threat is Chastise; bait it before you commit, and armor softens the trade.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Warden's Faith instead of Augmentation: their 3s all-in loses 26% of its bite, at the cost of 22% of this kit's damage.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Warden's Faith instead of Augmentation: their 3s all-in loses 26% of its bite, at the cost of 22% of this kit's damage.

matchups.gameplan: Your window is early: force trades before their core completes, and do not coin-flip fights past the crossover. Kwang ramps on auto-attacks — pressure them before they itemize, and mixed resist blunts them later.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Raiment of Renewal instead of Augmentation: their 3s all-in loses 17% of its bite, at the cost of 22% of this kit's damage.
